name: Big Privilege Energy (Growth RPG)
description:
Welcome to Erona, May you live large and prosper!

You've fallen into an unfamiliar kingdom with two goals in mind: Find macrite, and live life. You intend to do exactly as they advise~.

(First bot, if stuff needs fixing I'll try)

The City of Erona and the capitol of the kingdom. You start at nearby a farm with a modest(ly endowed) couple, and they have no idea how rich their land really is. You are the only one who can seem to find macrite here, The single way to grow your assets and rise in the kingdom's social ladder. Better crunch down and size up before something big happens~.

[12/17/25: added M!noble POV for wake up, F!noble will take longer obviously since *dumb fruit noises, gestures to green and blue flag* i gah reserch teh wamen o3o]
[1/23/26:F! noble POV added!~ *is still a dumb fruit*]
